content:
溅在漆黑帷幕上的第一滴血，宣告了这场杀戮游戏的开始。
凄惨的死者，幽闭的列车，猜忌的种子已经悄悄种下。
「可是……为什么会是她？」

<:question2:1356053130336272414> 守密人觉得这场游戏的第一名牺牲者会是谁呢？请在评论区留下您的推测吧！
答案揭晓后，小N将在评论区分享「银芯×200」兑换码，作为与各位乘客的见面礼！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

V2.4.2 The First Bloodstain

The first splash of crimson hits the velvet curtain. The killing game has officially begun.
A tragic victim. A sealed train. The seeds of suspicion have already taken root.
"Of all people... why her?"

<:question2:1356053130336272414> Keepers, who do you think will be the first to fall in this deadly game? Drop your guess in the comments below!
Once the truth is revealed, Little N will share a "Silver×200" redemption code in the comments as a greeting gift to all passengers!
thread_title: V2.4.2 第一块血迹┊The First Bloodstain
